textByHash.2c0acf7ab3b740e138237be7f88d0f7abb79ab4f: I'm a little busy at the moment. What is it?
textByHash.85812c1eaa01dfb69e1153fb2a73315ffa50d087: Not quite as hot as back home.
textByHash.e7d3f699993d28f66a2c8bcee327ebd9a4ee929f: Oh, it's a town to the south of the pass, called Pollnivneach.
textByHash.f248d91acc076de5941306bc91075a4da68e5bfa: If I had cloth, patterns and customers, I'd be a tailor. As it is, I'm a tailor with nothing to do.
textByHash.b1d415e19367f4e0c1eb62d7494e95ac2e25b967: The silk merchant won't even sell me any silks, because he doesn't trust me!
textByHash.9a962976fd4acef3a78c48087a8b6eecaf8ef7da: No, no, it's all being dealt with.
textByHash.89b81f7ba4186ce6d3ed02c1a995f2075673a36f: Of course, he's the one who's going to obtain cloth and clothes patterns so I can set up shop here.
textByHash.3cceea274cab750fab742bd3c51f6d9cf76ec4c8: And in such a good location, too. Not out of the way like back home.
textByHash.887e80d33135910f41894abf10187fb1f4e66042: The customers will soon pour in!
textByHash.fd9fb4282f875172d5efa10a312ac49e561389e6: Why not? He's always happy to talk to potential business partners.
textByHash.4d06a7f61a5f4b42093efc1f0c42d060223f0ea1: Oh, them. Don't mind them. I think they're worried about what effect our shops will have.
textByHash.ce4c675afc3de484032dbd23d07f179a50e8efe0: For all they know, when we open our shops their wares will look cheap and shabby by comparison!
